title: Voluntary work on rest days
content:
(1)	
An employee may, at his own request and if the employer 
agrees, work for his employer on a rest day.
	
(2)	
An employee may, at the request of his employer, work for 
his employer on a rest day.

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
